topic: r7i Instance Family Features and Architecture

  entities:
  
    r7i family|Product
    4th-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors|Product
    Sapphire Rapids|Product
    r6i instances|Product
    r7i instances|Product
    r7i instance family|Product
    r5 family|Product
    r7i.12xlarge|Product
    r7i.16xlarge|Product
    r7i.24xlarge|Product
    Intel CPU architecture|Product
    
  proposition: The r7i family is a family of instance types.
    
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types
      
  proposition: The r7i family is powered by 4th-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7i family|POWERED_BY|4th-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors
  
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: 4th-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors are code named Sapphire Rapids.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    4th-generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors|CODE_NAMED|Sapphire Rapids
  
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: The r7i family offers significant improvements over r6i instances.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i family|OFFERS_IMPROVEMENTS_OVER|r6i instances
    
  proposition: The r7i instances provide approximately 15% better compute price/performance than comparable r6i instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i instances|HAS_PERFORMANCE_IMPROVEMENT|approximately 15% better compute price/performance than comparable r6i instance types
    
  proposition: The r7i instances provide up to 20% higher memory bandwidth per vCPU than comparable r6i instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i instances|HAS_MEMORY_BANDWIDTH|up to 20% higher memory bandwidth per vCPU than comparable r6i instance types
    
  proposition: The r7i instance family has a 2-socket Intel CPU architecture.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7i instance family|HAS_ARCHITECTURE|Intel CPU architecture
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i instance family|HAS_SOCKET_COUNT|2-socket
    
  proposition: The r7i instance family has a 2-socket Intel CPU architecture similar to the r5 family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    r7i instance family|SIMILAR_TO|r5 family
    
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: The r5 family is a family of instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types
    
  proposition: The r7i.12xlarge is an instance type.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.12xlarge|IS_TYPE_OF|instance type
    
  proposition: The r7i.12xlarge and smaller types use a single socket.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.12xlarge|USES_SOCKET_COUNT|single socket
    
  proposition: The r7i.12xlarge and smaller types use the system memory owned by that single-socket processor.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.12xlarge|USES_MEMORY|system memory owned by that single-socket processor
    
  proposition: The r7i.16xlarge is an instance type.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.16xlarge|IS_TYPE_OF|instance type
    
  proposition: The r7i.24xlarge is an instance type.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.24xlarge|IS_TYPE_OF|instance type
    
  proposition: The r7i.16xlarge and r7i.24xlarge types use both sockets and available memory.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.16xlarge|USES_SOCKETS|both sockets and available memory
    r7i.24xlarge|USES_SOCKETS|both sockets and available memory
    
  proposition: There is some memory-management overhead required between two physical processors in a 2-socket architecture.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: The performance gains scaling up from a r7i.12xlarge to a r7i.16xlarge or r7i.24xlarge instance type are not as linear as you get scaling up at the smaller sizes.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i.12xlarge|HAS_SCALING_CHARACTERISTIC|performance gains scaling up from a r7i.12xlarge to a r7i.16xlarge or r7i.24xlarge instance type are not as linear as you get scaling up at the smaller sizes
    
  proposition: Performance scales linearly with compute capacity up to r7i.12xlarge in the r7i family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i family|HAS_PERFORMANCE_SCALING|linearly with compute capacity up to r7i.12xlarge
    
  proposition: The r7i family has enhanced memory management between physical processors in the 2-socket architecture.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i family|HAS_MEMORY_MANAGEMENT|enhanced memory management between physical processors in the 2-socket architecture
    
  proposition: The r7i family has improved performance for memory-intensive graph operations.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    r7i family|HAS_PERFORMANCE|improved performance for memory-intensive graph operations
    
  proposition: You can estimate the number of vCPUs needed using the formula vCPUs=(latencyxconcurrency)/2 for all of these instance families.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: Latency is measured as the average query latency in seconds in the vCPU estimation formula.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    
  proposition: Concurrency is measured as the target number of queries per second in the vCPU estimation formula.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
